notes: Operational roadmap for Post-Entry duty-rate sources. Source status controls product trust wording: auto_updatable means a maintained script can refresh official machine-readable rates; hybrid_official_candidate means some maintained rules can be promoted from an official parser while ambiguous prefixes stay scope-check gated; benchmark_updatable means a maintained script can refresh local benchmark metadata but the rate remains indicative; official_link means an official source is identified but not machine-refreshed yet; benchmark means local pre-check math only.

sources.name: United States HTS / USITC
sources.status_reason: USITC exposes a stable machine-readable HTS export endpoint for maintained HS prefixes.
sources.current_scope: General HTS base duty for maintained HS prefixes. Additional duties such as Section 301 and AD/CVD remain separate benchmark/scope checks.
sources.next_action: Keep USITC sync running before releases and monitor changes in data/duty-rates.json.

sources.name: EU TARIC
sources.authority: European Commission Taxation and Customs Union
sources.status_reason: EU TARIC consultation and CIRCABC full database are reachable; maintained HS prefixes are split so unambiguous ERGA OMNES third-country duty rows can be promoted to official_source_checked while ambiguous prefixes stay scope_check_required.
sources.current_scope: Hybrid EU coverage: official TARIC candidate duty for unambiguous HS prefixes, scope-check status for ambiguous prefixes, and benchmark member-state VAT shown separately.
sources.next_action: Continue TARIC workbook sync; promote only prefixes with one unambiguous ERGA OMNES third-country-duty rate and keep ambiguous prefixes exact-code gated.

sources.name: Germany import VAT with EU TARIC duty
sources.authority: European Commission TARIC / German tax authority
sources.status_reason: Germany uses EU TARIC for customs duty; the EU updater now promotes unambiguous TARIC duty candidates and keeps ambiguous prefixes exact-code gated. Germany VAT remains a separate benchmark layer.
sources.current_scope: Hybrid Germany coverage: official TARIC candidate duty where unambiguous, TARIC scope-check where exact code is needed, and Germany VAT benchmark separately.
sources.next_action: Keep using EU TARIC updater; next upgrade is exact TARIC-code input so ambiguous prefixes can resolve to one official rate.

sources.name: Netherlands import VAT with EU TARIC duty
sources.authority: European Commission TARIC / Dutch tax authority
sources.status_reason: Netherlands uses EU TARIC for customs duty; the EU updater now promotes unambiguous TARIC duty candidates and keeps ambiguous prefixes exact-code gated. Netherlands VAT remains a separate benchmark layer.
sources.current_scope: Hybrid Netherlands coverage: official TARIC candidate duty where unambiguous, TARIC scope-check where exact code is needed, and Netherlands VAT benchmark separately.
sources.next_action: Keep using EU TARIC updater; next upgrade is exact TARIC-code input so ambiguous prefixes can resolve to one official rate.

sources.name: Singapore Customs duties and GST
sources.status_reason: Singapore maintained high-tech HS lines use exact-line base-duty candidates while GST remains a separate tax layer.
sources.current_scope: Maintained Singapore exact-line base-duty candidates plus 9% GST value treatment reminder.
sources.next_action: Replace local exact map with machine-readable TradeNet/AHTN parser when available; keep GST separately refreshed.

sources.name: Mexico tariff / VAT
sources.status_reason: Mexico maintained high-tech HS lines use exact-line TIGIE candidates while VAT, NOM scope, and preferential-origin treatment remain separate checks.
sources.current_scope: Maintained Mexico exact-line IGI/base-duty candidates plus 16% VAT and NOM/origin review reminders.
sources.next_action: Replace local exact map with a machine-readable TIGIE/NICO parser when available; keep VAT, NOM, and preferential-origin checks refreshed.
parser_subtasks: Parse TIGIE/NICO exact tariff rows for high-tech HS lines and keep NICO subheading scope explicit.
Separate IGI duty, VAT, NOM certification, and preferential-origin treatment before promoting filing-grade results.
Flag routes where USMCA or other origin-transformation evidence is required before cost comparison.

sources.name: Japan Customs tariff
sources.status_reason: Japan Customs dated tariff schedule and chapter pages are parseable; maintained high-tech HS lines now carry exact-line candidates while consumption tax remains separate.
sources.current_scope: Maintained Japan exact-line base-duty candidates plus 10% consumption-tax value treatment reminder.
sources.next_action: Replace local exact map with Japan Customs chapter parser output where unambiguous; keep statistical-code gates for mixed-rate prefixes.
parser_subtasks: Parse Japan Customs tariff schedule rows by exact statistical code for high-tech HS lines.
Keep customs duty, consumption tax, and any temporary tariff measure as separate rate layers.
Gate promotion when one HS prefix maps to multiple statistical-code rates or product-scope notes.

sources.name: Korea Customs tariff / VAT
sources.status_reason: Korea Customs tariff inquiry source is identified; maintained high-tech HS lines now carry exact-line candidates while VAT and KC/origin scope remain separate.
sources.current_scope: Maintained Korea exact-line base-duty candidates plus 10% VAT and KC/origin review reminders.
sources.next_action: Replace local exact map with KCS 10-digit parser output where unambiguous; keep exact-HS gates for mixed-rate rows.

sources.name: India Customs Tariff / ICEGATE CIP
sources.authority: Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs / ICEGATE
sources.status_reason: India ICEGATE/CIP official-live probe is wired; maintained exact-line BCD candidates remain fallback while parser promotion stays gated by exact HSN and exemption scope.
sources.current_scope: Official-live probe candidate plus maintained exact-line BCD fallback; SWS/IGST and product-control review reminders stay separate.
sources.next_action: Promote ICEGATE/CIP parser output only where one unambiguous BCD/SWS/IGST row is found; keep exemption, IGST, BIS/QCO, WPC, and product-control checks refreshed.

sources.name: China import tariff / VAT
sources.authority: General Administration of Customs / Ministry of Finance
sources.status_reason: China maintained high-tech HS lines use exact-line MFN duty candidates while import VAT, origin preference, licensing, CCC/SRRC, and other product controls remain separate checks.
sources.current_scope: Maintained China exact-line MFN duty candidates plus 13% import VAT and product-control review reminders.
sources.next_action: Replace local exact map with machine-readable China Customs tariff parser output when available; keep VAT and product-control checks refreshed.
parser_subtasks: Map exact 8/10-digit China Customs tariff rows for priority high-tech HS lines such as 854231, 847150, 850760, and 9018.
Separate MFN duty, preferential-origin duty, import VAT, consumption tax, and license/control flags before filing-grade promotion.
Block promotion when one HS prefix maps to multiple tax rates or product-control notes.
rate_change_drivers: MFN duty, preferential-origin duty, or import VAT changes
CCC, SRRC, dual-use, or other product-control overlays

sources.name: Vietnam Customs tariff / VAT
sources.status_reason: Vietnam maintained high-tech HS lines use exact-line base-duty candidates while the updater probes official Vietnam Customs pages for parser readiness; VAT and preferential-origin scope remain separate checks.
sources.current_scope: Maintained Vietnam exact-line base-duty candidates plus VAT/preferential-origin review for electronics.
sources.next_action: Use official probe status to promote a Vietnam Customs/VNACCS parser only after exact HS rows are machine-readable; keep VAT, origin scope, and transit evidence separately refreshed.

sources.name: Malaysia Customs SST / duty
sources.status_reason: Malaysia maintained high-tech HS lines use exact-line duty candidates while the updater probes Royal Malaysian Customs/SST pages for parser readiness; SST, exemptions, SIRIM/MCMC/ST scope, and preferential-origin treatment remain separate checks.
sources.current_scope: Maintained Malaysia exact-line base-duty candidates plus SST/exemption and product-approval review reminders.
sources.next_action: Use official probe status to promote a Royal Malaysian Customs/SST parser only after exact HS rows are machine-readable; keep SST, exemptions, SIRIM/MCMC/ST, and transit evidence separately refreshed.

sources.name: Taiwan Customs tariff / business tax
sources.status_reason: Taiwan maintained high-tech HS lines use exact-line duty candidates while business tax, inspection, telecom approval, and tariff-line scope remain separate checks.
sources.current_scope: Maintained Taiwan exact-line base-duty candidates plus 5% business-tax and product-scope review reminders.
sources.next_action: Replace local exact map with machine-readable Taiwan Customs tariff parser when available; keep business tax and product inspection checks refreshed.

sources.name: Russia / EAEU tariff and VAT
sources.status_reason: Official customs source link is monitored, but exact EAEU tariff-line parsing is not wired yet and sanctions scope must stay separate from ordinary duty math.
sources.current_scope: Official-link monitored EAEU duty/VAT screening plus sanctions and restricted-party scope warning.
sources.next_action: Connect an exact EAEU/Russia tariff-line parser; keep sanctions and restricted-party scope flags separate from ordinary duty math.
